summary: Iteration 10 NEW FEATURES testing COMPLETE. All features verified working: Barman CRUD, Table server selection, Modules dropdown, KDS 4-column Kanban with delayed popup. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: 3 barmen (Carlos Bartender, Juliana Bar, Ricardo Mix), 4 tables (#1-3 main occupied, #4 VIP available), KDS tickets in all 4 columns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified all new features. localStorage must have 'active_venue_id' set to '40a24e04-75b6-435d-bfff-ab0d469ce543' for API calls to work. KDS has 1 delayed ticket (T1 Carlos) that shows the delayed popup automatically.

details.get_barmen_api: Returns 3 barmen (Carlos Bartender, Juliana Bar, Ricardo Mix)
details.create_barman_api: POST /api/staff/barmen creates barman with venue_id, name
details.tap_page_dropdown: Barman selector in TAP header shows all barmen
details.add_barman_btn: '+ Add barman' option at bottom of dropdown
details.edit_delete_icons: Pencil and trash icons appear on hover for each barman

details.server_dropdown_in_form: Open Table form has 'Server / Waiter' dropdown
details.dropdown_options: Shows barmen (Carlos Bartender, Juliana Bar, Ricardo Mix)

details.dropdown_button: 'Modules' dropdown button in Venue Home header
details.visible_modules: Pulse, TAP, Table, Kitchen (KDS), Manager, Owner
details.ceo_hidden: CEO module correctly NOT visible in dropdown
details.navigation_works: Clicking module navigates to correct page
details.cards_removed: Module cards NO longer at bottom of page

details.live_timers: Preparing tickets show countdown (e.g., '23:11 left'), Delayed show count-up ('+6:20 over!')
details.delayed_in_red: Delayed column and tickets styled in RED with 'Delayed' badge
details.auto_popup: ORDER DELAYED popup appears automatically for delayed orders
details.kitchen_bar_toggle: Toggle works to switch between Kitchen and Bar views

test_classes: TestHeaderSpacing - 2 tests for header API endpoints
